component.name: Clustta
component.summary: Version control, asset management and collaboration for creative workflows

description.p: Clustta simplifies file management, collaboration and version control for creative workflows. It provides a familiar, intuitive interface for managing assets, tracking changes, and collaborating with your team - designed specifically for creative professionals working with large files.

ul.li: Version control optimised for large binary files (images, video, audio, 3D models)
Visual asset browsing with thumbnails and metadata
Checkpoint-based history - save, compare, and restore any version
Organise assets with collections, tags, and dependencies
Works offline - sync when you're ready

screenshot.caption: Clustta desktop client showing asset browser with collections and thumbnails

description.p: Improved Linux desktop integration with proper dash icon and high-resolution icon support.
